abilities.name: Mobile Hunter-killers
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Cadia Stands!
abilities.desc: While this unit contains an **^^Officer^^**, each time a ranged attack targets this unit, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following unit: **^^Cadian Shock Troops^^**

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save 5+
abilities.desc: Ibram Gaunt has a 5+ Invulnerable Save

abilities.name: Covert Stealth Team
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

abilities.name: Tanith Camo-cloaks
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Medi-pack
abilities.desc: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Tempestus Scions models to this unit.

abilities.name: Command Rod
abilities.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit can be affected by up to two different Orders at the same time.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This unit can be attached to the following unit: **^^Tempestus Scions^^**

abilities.name: Tempestor Prime
abilities.desc: While this unit contains a Tempestor Prime, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Aeronautica Commander
abilities.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 30" of and visible to this unit’s Officer of the Fleet model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **^^Astra Militarum Aircraft^^** model makes a ranged attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Divination (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this unit’s Astropath model.

abilities.name: Attachés
abilities.desc:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit must join one **^^Command Squad^^** unit from your army (a **^^Command Squad^^** unit cannot have more than one **^^Regimental Attaché^^** unit joined to it). For the rest of the battle, every model in this unit counts as part of that **^^Command Squad^^** unit, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join a **^^Regimental Attaché^^** unit to a **^^Command Squad^^** in this way, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.


While this unit is joined to a unit, it can embark within any **^^Transport^^** that unit can embark within.

abilities.name: Artillery Commander
abilities.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 30" of and visible to this unit’s Master of Ordnance model that has not already been selected for this ability this phase. Until the end of the phase, Blast weapons equipped by friendly **^^Astra Militarum Artillery^^** models have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability when targeting that unit

abilities.name: Daring Recon
abilities.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **^^Astra Militarum^^** model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Screening Line
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

abilities.name: Sentry Programming
abilities.desc: You can target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abilities.name: Powerful Volley
abilities.desc: While this unit is being affected by an Order, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, Heavy weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Grenadiers
abilities.desc: Once per turn, you can target this unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Grenadier Squad
abilities.desc: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a **^^Krieg Combat Engineers^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Shoot Sharp and Scarper
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge

abilities.name: The Ratling Twins
abilities.desc: While this unit contains 2 models, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This unit can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Death Korps of Krieg^^**
- **^^Death Korps Grenadier Squad^^**
- **^^Infantry Squad^^**
- **^^Krieg Combat Engineers^^**

abilities.name: Medicae Medi-packs
abilities.desc: Whilst this unit contains one or more Medicae Servitors, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Mindlock
abilities.desc: While this unit contains a Quartermaster Revenant model, improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of this unit's Medical scalpels by 1

abilities.name: Sentinel Directives
abilities.desc: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.desc:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abilities.name: Defence Searchlight
abilities.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Mark the Target
abilities.desc: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Sniper Teams
abilities.desc: For the purposes of embarking within Transports, each Elysian Sniper Team model counts as one Heavy Weapons Team model.

abilities.name: Precision Drop
abilities.desc: In your Movement phase, when this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform a precision drop. If it does, this unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Servo-sentry
abilities.desc: When this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, the Tempestor Aquilon can shoot with its sentry weapon (its sentry flamer, sentry grenade launcher or sentry hot‑shot volley gun).

abilities.name: Shoot Sharp and Scarper
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Ratling Battlemutt
abilities.desc:
Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Ratling Battlemutt token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

abilities.name: Demolition Gear
abilities.desc: The bearer’s unit has the **^^Grenades^^** keyword.

abilities.name: Grim Determination
abilities.desc: While this unit contains an **^^Officer^^**, you can target this unit with Stratagems even while it is Battle-shocked and Orders issued to this unit do not cease to affect this unit if it becomes Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Death Korps of Krieg^^**, **^^Krieg Combat Engineers^^**

abilities.name: Alchemyk Counteragents
abilities.desc: The bearer's unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Servo-scribes
abilities.desc:
Once per battle, when issuing an Order, the Lord Commissar can issue one additional Order.


Designer's Note: Place a Servo-scribes token next to the unit, removing it when this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following unit: **^^Catachan Jungle Fighters^^**

abilities.name: Gung-ho Command
abilities.desc: While this unit contains an **^^Officer^^**, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

abilities.name: Final Duty
abilities.desc: While the Fire Coordinator model is on the battlefield, each time a Heavy Weapons Gunner model is destroyed, roll one D6: one a 3+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can shoot after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Embarking
abilities.desc: While embarked within a **^^Transport^^**, each Heavy Weapons Gunner model takes up the space of 2 models, and each weapon equipped by these models is considered to be 2 models' weapons for the purposes of the Firing Deck ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Cadian Shock Troops^^**

abilities.name: Lesk’s Heroes
abilities.desc: Add 1 to the Leadership characteristic of models in this unit and you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for this unit.

abilities.name: Heroic Example
abilities.desc: While this unit’s Minka Lesk model is on the battlefield, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save 5+
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ Invulnerable Save.

abilities.name: Regimental Banner
abilities.desc: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Emplacement Platform
abilities.desc: Friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry**^^ models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the platform section of this **^^Fortification^^**.

abilities.name: Reinforced Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Fortification^^**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Defence Line
abilities.desc: While an **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** model has the Benefit of Cover as a result of this terrain feature, that model has a 4+ invulnerable save

abilities.name: Deployment
abilities.desc: When this model is set up, it will consist of 1 platform section, up to 5 shield sections, up to 2 broken shield sections and up to 2 end sections. All sections must be connected to each other to form a continuous defence line; the 2 broken shield sections can be placed either at the end of the defence line, or in the middle of it such that both are within ½" of each other (in this case, these 2 sections count as being connected to each other). All of the sections that have been set up are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

abilities.name: Rolling Fortress
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an **^^Astra Militarum^^** model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Baneblade^^** model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Tremor Quake
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s tremor cannon, the target unit and every other enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit within 3" of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.desc: This model has a transport capacity of 26 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry models^^**. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

abilities.name: Armour Obliteration
abilities.desc: Each time an attack made with this model’s quake cannon destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

abilities.name: Earthshaker Rounds
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Cadian Shock Troops^^**, **^^Kasrkin^^**

abilities.name: Senior Officer
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability

abilities.name: Get Back in the Fight
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

units.name: Cadian Veteran Guardsman w/ Regimental standard
Cadian Veteran Guardsman w/ Master vox

abilities.name: Mobile Command Vehicle
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, one **^^Officer^^** model embarked within this **^^Transport^^** can issue Orders even though it is not on the battlefield. When doing so, measure distances to and from this *^^Transport^^**.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Cadian Shock Troops^^**, **^^Catachan Jungle Fighters^^**, **^^Death Korps of Krieg^^**, **^^Kasrkin^^**, **^^Krieg Combat Engineers^^**, **^^Tempestus Scions^^**

abilities.name: Summary Execution
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. If you do, one model in that unit is destroyed, and that unit is then no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Political Overwatch
abilities.desc: While another **^^Officer^^** model is in the same unit as this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

abilities.name: Deathstrike Missile
abilities.desc:
In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, if it has not shot with its  Deathstrike missile this battle, you can do one of the following in addition to resolving this model’s ranged attacks:

- **Designate Target:** If this model does not have a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, place a Deathstrike Target marker for this model anywhere on the battlefield.

- **Adjust Target:** If this model has a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, move that marker to anywhere else on the battlefield.

abilities.name: Close-range Titan Killer
abilities.desc: Each time this model’s magma cannon targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, that target is always considered to be within half range of that weapon.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save 5+
abilities.desc: Ibram Gaunt has a 5+ Invulnerable Save

units.name: Tanith Ghost w/ Corbec's hot-shot lascarbine
Tanith Ghost w/ Mkoll's Straight Silver Knife

abilities.name: Close-quarters Warfare
abilities.desc: This model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for making ranged attacks while enemy units are within Engagement Range of it.

abilities.name: Flush Them Out
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is scattered. While a unit is scattered, it cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Flak Battery
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can **^^Fly^^**, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- Catachan Jungle Fighters

abilities.name: Cold Steel and Courage
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abilities.name: Been There, Seen it, Killed it
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a melee attack, if it made a Charge move this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: The Lord Solar
abilities.desc: At the start of your Command phase, If this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: The Collegiate Astrolex
abilities.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Astra Militarum^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.desc: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Attilan Rough Riders^^**, **^^ Cadian Shock Troops^^**, **^^ Catachan Jungle Fighters^^**, **^^ Death Korps of Krieg^^**, **^^Death Riders^^**, **^^Kasrkin^^**, **^^Krieg Combat Engineers^^**

abilities.name: Furious Barrage
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**) that was hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model's storm eagle rockets. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is staggered. While a unit is staggered, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

abilities.name: Command Rod
abilities.desc: While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit can be affected by up to two different Orders at the same time.

abilities.name: Thunderous Head-butt
abilities.desc: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Loyal Protector
abilities.desc:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model must join one **^^Command Squad^^** unit from your army (a **^^Command Squad^^** cannot have more than one **^^Loyal Protector^^** model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that **^^Command Squad^^** for the rest of the battle, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join this model to a **^^Command Squad^^**, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed. 

While this model is joined to a unit, it can embark within any **^^Transport^^** that unit can embark within, and takes up the space of 3 models.

This model cannot be selected as your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Loyal Protector
abilities.desc:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model must join one **^^Command Squad^^** unit from your army (a **^^Command Squad^^** cannot have more than one **^^Loyal Protector^^** model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that **^^Command Squad^^** for the rest of the battle, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join this model to a **^^Command Squad^^**, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed. 

While this model is joined to a unit, it can embark within any **^^Transport^^** that unit can embark within, and takes up the space of 3 models.


This model cannot be selected as your **^^Warlord^^** and cannot be given Enhancements.

abilities.name: Slabshield
abilities.desc: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 7.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Cadian Shock Troops^^**, **^^Catachan Jungle Fighters^^**, **^^Death Korps of Krieg^^**, **^^Kasrkin^^**, **^^Krieg Combat Engineers^^**, **^^Tempestus Scions^^**

abilities.name: Malign Wardings (Psychic)
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks

abilities.name: Psychic Barrier (Psychic)
abilities.desc: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this **^^Psyker^^**’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, models in this **^^Psyker^^**’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- Cadian Shock Troops
- Catachan Jungle Fighters
- Death Korps of Krieg
- Infantry Squad
- Kasrkin
- Munitorum Servitors

abilities.name: Enginseer
abilities.desc: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **^^Astra Militarum Vehicle^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability

abilities.name: Vengeance for the Omnissiah
abilities.desc: If a friendly **^^Astra Militarum Vehicle^^** model is destroyed within 12" of this model, until the end of the battle, this model’s Enginseer axe has an Attacks characteristic of 6

abilities.name: Omnissiah’s Blessing
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Vehicle^^** model within 3" of this model. That **^^Vehicle^^** model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, that **^^Vehicle^^** model has a 4+ invulnerable save. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Ablative Plating
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to this model, you change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- Catachan Jungle Fighters

abilities.name: Payback Time
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when this model is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, its Payback weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the **[SUSTAINED HITS 3]** ability instead of the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Harker’s Hellraisers
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, if the attacking model is more than 12" away, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Titan-killer
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its volcano cannon that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, that attack has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Like Fighting a Shadow
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: One-man Army
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets a friendly **^^Regiment^^** unit within 3" of this model, after that enemy unit has shot, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

abilities.name: Mount Up!
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this **^^Transport^^**, you can select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** unit (excluding **^^Artillery^^** units) that is wholly within 6" of this **^^Transport^^**. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this **^^Transport^^**.

abilities.name: Concussive Wave
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s Stormsword siege cannon, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other unit within 3" of that unit: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by a concussive wave. After this model has finished making its attacks against that target unit this phase, each unit struck by a concussive wave suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Death Befitting An Officer
abilities.desc: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play – it can, after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, shoot as if it were your Shooting phase and as if it had its full wounds remaining. This model is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Vox-net
abilities.desc: Each time this model issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 12" away

abilities.name: Rapid Deployment
abilities.desc: Units can disembark from this **^^Transport^^** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

abilities.name: Transport Support
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this **^^Transport^^** this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Cadian Shock Troops**^^, **^^Kasrkin^^**

abilities.name: Lord Castellan
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can be affected by up to two different Orders at the same time.

abilities.name: Tactical Genius
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly **^^Regiment^^** unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1 CP.

abilities.name: Airborne Insertion
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this **^^Transport^^** can disembark from it.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Suppression Bombardment
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**) that was hit by one or more attacks made with this model’s Wyvern quad stormshard mortar. Unit the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Ancient Conquest
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within your opponent’s deployment zone, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Demolition Charges
abilities.desc: Each time this model or an enemy unit ends a move, if this model is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. This model is destroyed, but instead of rolling for its Deadly Demise ability, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Unstable Payload
abilities.desc: When rolling for this model’s Deadly Demise ability, units within 6" suffer mortal wounds on a 4+, instead of on a 6.

abilities.name: Compact
abilities.desc: This model can embark within an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT model as if it were an INFANTRY model. If it does, it takes up the space of 7 models.

abilities.name: Rugged Reliability
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Battlefield Dominance
abilities.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

abilities.name: Armoured Defender
abilities.desc: Each time you target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

abilities.name: Explosive Death
abilities.desc: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play – it can, after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, shoot with its inferno gun as if it were your Shooting phase and as if it had its full wounds remaining. This model is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Siege Bombardment
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Earthshaker Rounds
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an INFANTRY unit, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that INFANTRY unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Close-range Devastation
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its Stormblade plasma blastgun that targets a unit within half range, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Battlefield Control
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, if it is within range of an objective marker you control, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Tank Hunter
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its Macharius twin vanquisher cannon that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Battlefield Control
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, if it is within range of an objective marker you control, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

rangedWeapons.name: ➤ Praetor launcher - firestorm
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Blast, Heavy, Ignores Cover, Indirect Fire

rangedWeapons.name: ➤ Praetor launcher - foehammer
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-MONSTER 4+, Anti-VEHICLE 4+, Blast, Heavy, Indirect Fire

abilities.name: Targeting Coordinates
abilities.desc: While this model is being affected by an Order, each time it makes an attack with its Praetor launcher, it does not suffer the penalty to the Hit roll for attacking a unit that is not visible to it.

abilities.name: Fire Support
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Tracking Target
abilities.desc: Each time this model is selected to shoot, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, its Colossus siege mortar has the [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+] abilities while resolving those attacks.

abilities.name: Power Overload
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abilities.name: Fiery Vengeance
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when another friendly ASTRA MILITARUM unit within 6" of this model is destroyed by an attack made by a unit that can Fly, one model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, that model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abilities.name: Agile Dogfighter
abilities.desc: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Gunship Barrage
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Heavy Bombs
abilities.desc: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll nine D6, adding 1 to each result if that unit is a MONSTER or VEHICLE: for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Inferno Bombs
abilities.desc: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll nine D6, adding 1 to each result if that unit is not a MONSTER or VEHICLE: for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Bomb Drop
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Subterranean Assault
abilities.desc: Each time you set up this model on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, you can select one friendly ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit in Strategic Reserves. If you do, set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 9" of this model and more than 9" away from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Support Vehicle
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, select one friendly ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE model within 3" of this model. That VEHICLE model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that VEHICLE model makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. The same VEHICLE model cannot be selected for both this ability and the REGIMENTAL ENGINSEER's Omnissiah’s Blessing ability in the same turn, and each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

abilities.name: Fire Support
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Aerial Deployment
abilities.desc: If this model starts the game in Hover mode and in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

abilities.name: Pinning Bombardment
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Dominus triple bombard scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable Save against ranged attacks.

abilities.name: Mount Up!
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this **^^Transport^^**, you can select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** unit (excluding **^^Artillery^^** units) that is wholly within 6" of this **^^Transport^^**. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this **^^Transport^^**.

abilities.name: Blistering Advance
abilities.desc: Units can disembark from this Transport after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn

abilities.name: Overwhelming Short-range Firepower
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll or 1.

abilities.name: Tank Hunter
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Wound roll

abilities.name: Recovery Vehicle
abilities.desc: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one friendly Astra Militarum Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Defence Searchlight
abilities.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Meteoric Descent
abilities.desc: When this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform a meteoric descent. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Rearm, Reload, Fire
abilities.desc: While this model is being affected by an Order, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability

abilities.name: Pinning Bombardment
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Medusa siege cannon scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Suppression Bombardment
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) hit by one or more of those attacks. Unit the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Aerial Deployment
abilities.desc: If this model starts the game in Hover mode and in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

abilities.name: Anti-armour Gunship
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a Monster or Vehicle model, re-roll a Damage roll of 1

abilities.name: Armoured Frontis
abilities.desc: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Death Riders^^**


*You can attach this model to the above unit even if one **^^Death Rider Squadron Commander^^**, **^^Lord Marshal Dreir^^** or **^^Lord Solar Leontus^^** model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.*

abilities.name: Summary Execution
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY or ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. If you do, one model in that unit is destroyed, and that unit is then no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Political Overwatch
abilities.desc: While another Officer model is in the same unit as this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

abilities.name: Powerlifter Charge
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Reinforced Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack

abilities.name: Furious Barrage
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack with its storm eagle rockets that targets an enemy unit that contains five or more models, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Flak Battery
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can Fly, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Reinforced Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack

abilities.name: Suppression Bombardment
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model’s Griffon heavy mortar. Unit the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Earthshaker Rounds
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Reinforced Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.desc:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abilities.name: Outflank
abilities.desc: When this model arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

abilities.name: Turbo-boost
abilities.desc: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

abilities.name: Mobile Hunter-killer
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Auspex Surveyor
abilities.desc: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover

abilities.name: Rolling Fortress
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an ASTRA MILITARUM model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Arkurian Stormhammer model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack

abilities.name: Mobile Command Vehicle
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, one **^^Officer^^** model embarked within this **^^Transport^^** can issue Orders even though it is not on the battlefield. When doing so, measure distances to and from this **^^Transport^^**.

abilities.name: Alchemyk Counteragents
abilities.desc: The bearer's unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Servo-scribes
abilities.desc:
Once per battle, when issuing an Order, the Lord Commissar can issue one additional Order.


Designer's Note: Place a Servo-scribes token next to the unit, removing it when this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Tough to Kill
abilities.desc: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D3 wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following unit: **^^Death Riders^^**

abilities.name: Leading the Charge
abilities.desc: Each time this model's unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Called Shots
abilities.desc: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks.

abilities.name: Vox-net
abilities.desc: Each time this model issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 12" away

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Cadian Shock Troops^^**, **^^Catachan Jungle Fighters^^**, **^^Death Korps of Krieg^^**, **^^Kasrkin^^**, **^^Krieg Combat Engineers^^**, **^^Tempestus Scions^^**,

abilities.name: War Hymns
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Holy Piety
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a melee attack, unless this model's unit is Battle-shocked, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Remorseless Barrage
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with an Indirect Fire weapon scored a hit against an enemy unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test (if an **^^Infantry^^** unit is hit by one or more attacks made by a multiple rocket launcher, they must subtract 1 from their Battle-shock test when doing so).

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Ratlings^^**

abilities.name: Well-stocked Supplies
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: A Hearty 'Pick Me Up'
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to that unit.
